texto: I'm at my best when people are depending on me. If it's just on me and I don't have nothing to do, I'm going to be lazy. On the football field, it's every single day, every play, knowing that people are depending on me to make my play. That helps me elevate my game to another level.
explicacao: Citação de Von Miller sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I'm at my best when people are depending on me. If it's just on me and I don't have nothing to do…” articula sucesso, day, football em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como termino e football.

frase_original: I'm at my best when people are depending on me. If it's just on me and I don't have nothing to do, I'm going to be lazy. On the football field, it's every single day, every play, knowing that people are depending on me to make my play. That helps me elevate my game to another level.

texto: I like the sci-fi channel. Just science in general. I came across a segment on time travel and how time travel is possible. We create a spaceship that's moving at almost the speed of light, we go in that spaceship in outer space, and we fly around for a year, when we get back to Earth, Earth would've aged 10 years.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Von Miller: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I like the sci-fi channel. Just science in general. I came across a segment on time travel and ho…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, travel, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e time.
